name: kodex
description: Kodex — make peer-CLI delegation the default execution mode in Claude Code. The parent session reasons and verifies; a peer CLI agent does the mechanical work.

plugins.name: kodex
plugins.description: Default-mode delegation: route mechanical work (bulk file ops, build/install commands, codegen, scaffolding) to a peer CLI agent. Provides a /kodex slash command, a model-invokable skill, and a PreToolUse hook that intercepts mechanical Bash patterns and redirects them to the peer.
